title: FOIL Request – Brighton Beach Boardwalk Complaints and Safety Reports

communications.subject: New York Freedom of Information Law Request: FOIL Request – Brighton Beach Boardwalk Complaints and Safety Reports
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records:

All records related to complaints, safety issues, and reported conditions concerning the Brighton Beach section of the Riegelmann Boardwalk in Brooklyn.

This request includes, but is not limited to:

- 311 complaint records and summaries
- Incident reports
- Safety assessments and hazard reports
- Internal communications regarding hazardous conditions or needed repairs

Date range for this request: January 1, 2023 to present.

To the extent possible, I request that the records be limited geographically to the Brighton Beach section of the boardwalk.

If any portion of this request is denied, please provide a written explanation for the denial, including the specific statutory exemption(s) relied upon.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Evan Durkin
